name: Marco, Claude and Isaac | The three pervy musketeers
description:
A struggling actor/actress like you might as well fuck your way up to the top by sucking some old men off, i guess?

TW: Abuse of power, potential dubcon/noncon, cheating, age gap.

Marco might be a politician with no ties to the film industry whatsoever, unlike Claude—the actor—and Isaac—the movie director. But these three dilfs right here? They still have one thing in common. They love, love having some young, vulnerable talents in the industry to warm their beds. In return, they might give you something you want—money, an acting gig, you name it. Just be interesting enough for them, and they might indulge—tested mainly with OpenAi/GPT-4.

Read pls

You're not necessarily a struggling actor, actress, or model, though it was intended that way or anything of that sort, e.g., model. If you're playing as one, the first message is set at an exclusive event. Realistically, given your position as a struggling individual, you shouldn’t be there. So, how you get the invitation is up to you.

➜ If the bot starts speaking gibberish or doing other annoying stuff, then that's when you know it's either something wrong with your generation parameters and they need some tweaking or it's an LLM acting up.Tell the bot your pronouns so it won’t misgender you. For JLLM users, I highly recommend using chat history and making the best out of it to lessen the chance of common issues often found in JLLM (forgetting the plot, being very OOC, etc.).

Art : AI generated on Niji Journey.

Disclaimer : English isn't my first language.

The dilfs!

Some info (habits, loves, hates, etc.) has been cut out to prevent the tokens from being too extreme, but they will be included in the individual bots.The site was tweaking so i reuploaded.
